seoTitle: St Mary vs Staaten — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest

ogTitle: St Mary vs Staaten: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in St Mary and Staaten.
heading: St Mary vs Staaten — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between St Mary, Queensland and Staaten, Queensland. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Staaten has a lower overall climate risk score (30/100) compared to St Mary (44/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is St Mary or Staaten safer from flooding?
faq.answer: St Mary has a flood risk score of 44/100, while Staaten scores 37/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: St Mary scores 61/100 for bushfire risk. Staaten scores 26/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in St Mary or Staaten?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Staaten has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 2.12% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
